mission.title: opentelemetry-collector: Discussion of Consistent Routing by TraceID
mission.description: Discussion of Consistent Routing by TraceID. Requested by 7+ users.

steps.title: Check current opentelemetry-collector deployment
steps.description:
Verify your opentelemetry-collector version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-collector
helm list -n opentelemetry-collector 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working opentelemetry-collector installation.

steps.title: Review opentelemetry-collector configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant opentelemetry-collector configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-collector
kubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry-collector
```
**Need**

Creating this issue to continue a discussion from the Otel/Agent Collector meeting.  We have need for a custom exporter with the following attributes.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Discussion of Consistent Routing by TraceID
steps.description:
Glad to see this! As mentioned in the call yesterday, I had this in my radar for some time now and my initial idea was very close to what  implemented before, except that it would be an exporter instead of a processor and it wouldn't redirect spans to peers, but rather, to backends. This way, there
```yaml
OTel Collector (adds hashed traceid header) -> Envoy -> OTel Collector (tail sampler)
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-collector
kubectl get events -n opentelemetry-collector --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Discussion of Consistent Routing by TraceID" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Glad to see this! As mentioned in the call yesterday, I had this in my radar for some time now and my initial idea was very close to what  implemented before, except that it would be an exporter instead of a processor and it wouldn't redirect spans to peers, but rather, to backends. This way, there could be 20 backend instances and only one loadbalancer.
codeSnippets: OTel Collector (adds hashed traceid header) -> Envoy -> OTel Collector (tail sampler)

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with opentelemetry-collector installed or the issue environment reproducible.
